'''Surl''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] customs agent for the [[Cormond]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]]. He had a [[Color/Legends|red]] trimmed beard, was heavy and rotund, and seemed to be perpetually sweating. His air of bureaucratic denseness belied his true nature, as an ambitious and corrupt agent of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]].<ref name="CatCW" />

Surl had a talent for developing and maintaining [[Spy/Legends|spy]] networks. He had many contacts in diplomatic circles, on the street, in the market, in the [[Black market/Legends|black market]], and even in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. He had a talent for getting what he wanted with forgery and bureaucratic doubletalk. All in all, he was an excellent agent for ISB, except that his ambition led him to skim off the top from [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] he acquired and assets he impounded.<ref name="CatCW" />

Surl's lover was [[Dania]], a member of a [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]] Rebel cell almost as corrupt as Surl himself.<ref name="CatCW" />

==Sources==
